gist.headline: Reality sync complete
gist.blurb: The API docs have been automatically regenerated to match reality. The bots did the typing so you don't have to guess the endpoints.
gist.summary: Automatically regenerated the APIDOCS.md file to reflect the latest OpenAPI specification changes.
gist.impact: Developers have access to the most up-to-date and accurate API documentation for integrating Pollinations.
gist.visual_concept: The round Nomnom creature eating old deprecated documentation scrolls while Polly the bee writes in a glowing new book.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round tan nomnom creature happily eating a stack of old paper scrolls while the cute bee mascot writes in a glowing magical book. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'DOCS'.
